scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pans-software-uv-cache uv sync --group dev
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pans-software-uv-cache uv run pytest tests -v
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pans-software-uv-cache uv run ruff check .
scripts.typecheck:backend: cd backend && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pans-software-uv-cache uv run mypy app
scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/pans-software-uv-cache uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload
